questionHtml:
Down syndrome can be detected before birth by chorionic villus sampling. From where are the cells for this test taken?

A. Amniotic fluid surrounding the fetus

B. Fetal digestive system

C. Tissue in the placenta

D. Lining of the uterus of the mother
